docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,886.04 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES (SF1) AS TO DEFENDANT PHELPS MARVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES (SF1) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHELPS MARVIN $1,886.04 PRINCIPAL, $53.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,939.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
